A pronged iron weapon designed to catch and disarm blades. Small enough to conceal, the sai turns defense into offense â€” a miss against the sai's wielder may cost the attacker their own weapon.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedOne-Handed, Finesse, Light, Melee d4, Piercing
BasicOne-Handed, Finesse, Light, Melee d4, Conceal, Deflect, Nimble
MasterOne-Handed, Finesse, Light, Melee d4, Conceal, Deflect, Nimble â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkYou gain +1 to AC while wielding this weapon. When an enemy misses you with a melee attack, they must succeed on a Strength or Dexterity saving throw or drop their weapon.
